body_txt: An item that changes based on the expression or emotional state of its master, though it usually has no reason whatsoever to do it. Expressive Shirt is a Sub-Trope . Often overlaps with Signature Headgear . If this happens as part of a picture or artwork, it's Creepy Changing Painting . Related to Empathy Pet , which is the animal companion version of this trope. Compare to sister tropes Expressive Hair , Expressive Mask and Eye Glasses .
